evidence: David describes his “horrendous process” of manually copying transcripts from Fathom to Google Docs for his Custom GPT. Vrijen calls this “living like a savage” and shows David his own Fathom integration in Zo.
Vrijen explains that Zo is a “file system attached to an agent,” not just a chat project.
Vrijen introduces David to Claude code, an agentic terminal tool pre-installed on Zo. He demonstrates how Claude code can “grasp how the system works” by reviewing files and scripts natively.
Vrijen explains that the integration was built easily using Gemini Flash by providing the API/webhook documentation to the agent.
Logan identified that AI adoption often stalls because employees struggle with the "metacognition" required to zoom out and analyze their own tasks.

Ilya noted that even “perfect” documentation of tasks is just the first step; the true challenge lies in the massive efficiency gains and management complexity of scaling to thousands of agents within an organization (e.g., 100 employees managing 100 agents each).
Ilya’s primary advice was for Careerspan to “protect their peace” and their IP, even if it has to be shelved for a year.
